Username must be 3-16 characters!: Li k’ab’a’ej tento naq 3-16 chi tz’iib’!
Password must contain at least one upper: Li contraseña tento naq wanq ka’ajwi’ jun li nimla tz’iib’!
Password must be 8-16 characters!: Li k’ab’a’ej tento naq 8-16 chi tz’iib’!
Passwords do not match!: Eb’ li contraseña ink’a’ neke’xk’am rib’!
Not your preferred language?: Ma ink’a’ li aatinob’aal jwal nawulak chawu?
Password must contain at least one symbo: Li contraseña tento naq wanq ka’ajwi’ jun li eetalil chi sa’!
● Username Length Must Be Between 3-16: ● Li xnimal li kʼabʼaʼej tento naq wanq saʼ xyanq 3-16
● Password Length Must Be Between 8-16: ● Li xnimal li contraseña tento naq wanq saʼ xyanq 8-16 .
Password must contain at least one lower: Li k’a’uxl tento naq wanq ka’ajwi’ jun li ch’ina tz’iib’!
Password must contain at least one numbe: Li contraseña tento naq wanq ka’ajwi’ jun ajl chi sa’!
Tz'iib'a junaq ch'ol aatin sa' laawaatinob'aal...
